string 2: Bzzz...
{next}It's a fly.
{next}It's a mosquito.
{next}It's nothing.
Bzz! Bzz! Bzz! I... am the...
Bzz! Bzz! Bzz! Bzz! I... am...
Bzz... Bzz...
I... am the...
{next}The what?
{next}Huh?
{next}Did I hear something?
...am the... I am...
...isten...! I am...!
Bzz! Bzz! Bzz! I am...!
...am the...
...mperor!
{next}I heard something.
{next}..."Pepperoni"?
{next}I must be hearing things.
...Look! ...ere! Over here!
...No! ...isten! Listen! I SAID, "LISTEN!"
...ou! You! Are you ignoring me?!
...Look! Look carefully! Focus your eyes!
I am the Dragon Emperor!
{next}Dragon... Emperor?
{next}Drag... Queen?
{next}Am I still hearing things?
Yes! You are right! The Dragon Emperor!

Are you really listening?! Oh, enough of this. Call me 
whatever you like.

You are doing that on purpose, are you not?! You think 
that is funny?! Hm?!

In any case, I am glad you have noticed. All of my comrades 
are too thick-headed.

I am Examon. I was always told I was too big, so I made 
myself smaller, but I overdid it.

I am new to this world and am struggling to get back to
normal. Do you know a way?
{next}Want to try medicine?
{next}Can't you fix it on your own?
{next}Why not just stay like that?
Medicine...? If you know of something, please tell me!

I have been trying for a long time now. I hate to say it, but 
I am helpless, here!

I refuse. It is inconvenient to go unnoticed by my comrades 
and I find that I miss them...

Do you have any ideas? Hmm... A recovery medicine that 
also promotes growth...?

That medicine sounds like it might work. You must take me 
to where I can find it.
Let us leave at once. Naturally, I shall accompany you!

I see. Being unable to return to its original size. That
must be very troubling...
And where is this Examon right now?

I am right here! I may be small in size, but I know you cannot 
miss my large presence!
Hmm. Are you really here? I cannot see a thing.

Anyway, let us try using the medicine. I will pour it over
your head.

Over here? A little more to the right? This is so difficult... 
I will simply scatter it!
Ah, this is good...! It seems to be working!

...Examon. So you WERE there. I can finally kind of see 
you now.

Say whatever you want. All I want is to get back to my 
original size.

Hmm... It looks like I am still getting bigger. Let us move to 
a larger place.

I will accompany you. I would like to see how the medicine
works.

This is working great! My body is gradually
returning to its original size!

Hm? That is no ordinary group of Digimon coming this way. 
I wonder what is going on...
Hey! Who the hell are you?!

It sounds like you do not know your manners!
You should introduce yourself first!

Your size is nothing compared to ours! Hey, guys! Let's show
this idiot who the boss is!

You must be the remnants of the Titans. Leave this place at
once!

Hell, no. The rest of my buddies are on their way. How does
that sound? Hm? You scared?

We have nothing to fear from the likes of you. I will make
you regret your deeds.
I will join you. I cannot let these thugs run free!
But it seems you are not quite back to your full size yet...
I am more than big enough to defeat these cowards!

Besides, I cannot just turn a blind eye. I may not be at full 
strength, but I can fight!
Thank you. Of course I will fight alongside you.

Although I was not quite my full strength in this body, 
it looks like we have won.
Hm? Oh, it seems my power is... returning at last!

Finally! I am back to normal. Oh, this feeling... 
It has been so long...!

It seems that the medicine has worked as I hoped. 
What a relief.
Because you were so miniscule before, now you seem enormous.

I am back to normal now, despite all the trouble I went 
through to make myself small.

Although, I am starting to feel that this size suits me best. 
May I ask what you think?
{next}Yes, this original size is the best.
{next}A smaller size would be more convenient.
{next}Palm-sized was cuter.

I see! So you like the bigger version of me. I mean, the
bigger the better, they say.

Hmm... Well, I suppose it was easier to move around when I
was smaller.

Do not use the word "cute" toward the Dragon Emperor! 
I want to be seen as "classy"!
I have made up my mind. I will stay my original size.

Those Titan remnants... Do you not think they were stronger
than expected?

I agree with you. They were a lot trickier than I thought
they would be.

If even those thugs were strong enough to make us struggle,
I must be more prepared!

I need to be able to give my best. Now that I have recovered, 
what should I do next...?
{next}King Drasil is calling for you.
{next}Don't you have any plans?
{next}Why not try getting even bigger?
King Drasil is? Ah, I remember being summoned now.

Perhaps I shall catch up with my comrades. I wonder if I can
find any at the rendezvous point.

Now that I am my normal size, it is meaningless if I cannot
find my comrades.

What are you doing?! If I get any bigger, I will become too 
big to see!

I feel my current size suits me best. I shall do what I can 
now that I am back to normal.

I was preoccupied with the misfortune that had befallen me,
but now that is over.

Now that I am back to normal, I can give it my all. I am
ready to fulfill my mission.
I shall head for the appointed spot.

I am sure you can exert the best of your power in that size.
I wish for your success.
Also... in my opinion, your original size suits you best.
Hmph. You are just flattering me.
...Hohoho. It looks like your tail has a slight swing in it now.
...Argh. Do not look!

I shall be going now. Oh... Here. This is for helping me with 
everything. See you soon!
{next}I'll show you the way.
{end}I'm too busy right now.
Great. I am counting on you.
Understood. Come back again when you are free.
Are you free now? Take me to where the medicine is!
